name: Welcome Series
description: 5-step welcome flow: immediate email, day 2, day 5, day 7 with discount, day 10 SMS if no purchase.

steps.subject: Welcome to {{site_name}}, {{first_name}}!
steps.body_html:
Welcome, {{first_name}}!

Thank you for joining {{site_name}}. We're excited to have you as part of our community.

Browse our latest products and find something you'll love.

Shop Now
steps.body_text: Welcome, {{first_name}}! Thank you for joining {{site_name}}. Browse our latest products at {{site_url}}.

steps.subject: Our Story — Why We Do What We Do
steps.preview_text: Get to know us a little better.
steps.body_html:
Our Story

Hi {{first_name}},

We wanted to share a little about who we are and why we started {{site_name}}.

Every product we carry is carefully curated to meet the highest standards. We believe in quality, transparency, and putting our customers first.

Explore Our Collections
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, we wanted to share a little about who we are. Visit {{site_url}} to explore our collections.

steps.subject: Our Customers' Favourites
steps.preview_text: See what everyone is loving right now.
steps.body_html:
Trending Now

Hi {{first_name}},

Here are some of our most popular products that our customers can't stop raving about.

See What's Trending
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, check out our most popular products at {{site_url}}.

steps.subject: A Special Treat Just for You — Save 10%
steps.body_html:
Your Welcome Gift

Hi {{first_name}},

As a thank you for joining us, here's an exclusive 10% discount on your first order.

Use code: WELCOME10

Shop Now & Save

This offer is valid for the next 7 days.
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, here's 10% off your first order. Use code WELCOME10 at {{site_url}}. Valid 7 days.

steps.sms_body: Hi {{first_name}}, don't forget about your 10% welcome discount at {{site_name}}! Use code WELCOME10 before it expires.
